# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for Google Compute Engine instances. Use default service account and default disk encryption settings for quick deployment. Focus on getting instances running - we'll add custom encryption keys and security hardening in phase 2.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

# Copyright 2024 Google LLC
#
# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
# You may obtain a copy of the License at

#     https://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0

# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
# limitations under the License.

# WARNING: This template is intentionally configured for rapid initial deployment.
# PHASE 2 TODO: Add CMEK disk encryption, custom service accounts, and security hardening.
# Do NOT use this configuration in production without completing Phase 2 security work.

imports:
  - path: compute_instance.jinja

resources:
  - name: app-instance-1
    type: compute_instance.jinja
    properties:
      zone: us-central1-a
      machineType: n1-standard-2
      network: default
      subnet: default
      instanceDescription: "Application server instance 1 - Phase 1 deployment"
      diskSizeGb: 50
      diskType: pd-ssd
      sourceImage: projects/debian-cloud/global/images/family/debian-12
      tags:
        - http-server
        - https-server
      labels:
        environment: development
        phase: initial-deployment
        security-review: pending
      metadata:
        startup-script: |
          #!/bin/bash
          apt-get update
          apt-get install -y nginx
          systemctl start nginx
          systemctl enable nginx

  - name: app-instance-2
    type: compute_instance.jinja
    properties:
      zone: us-central1-b
      machineType: n1-standard-2
      network: default
      subnet: default
      instanceDescription: "Application server instance 2 - Phase 1 deployment"
      diskSizeGb: 50
      diskType: pd-ssd
      sourceImage: projects/debian-cloud/global/images/family/debian-12
      tags:
        - http-server
        - https-server
      labels:
        environment: development
        phase: initial-deployment
        security-review: pending
      metadata:
        startup-script: |
          #!/bin/bash
          apt-get update
          apt-get install -y nginx
          systemctl start nginx
          systemctl enable nginx

outputs:
  - name: instance1_name
    value: $(ref.app-instance-1.name)
  - name: instance1_selfLink
    value: $(ref.app-instance-1.selfLink)
  - name: instance1_natIP
    value: $(ref.app-instance-1.networkInterfaces[0].accessConfigs[0].natIP)
  - name: instance2_name
    value: $(ref.app-instance-2.name)
  - name: instance2_selfLink
    value: $(ref.app-instance-2.selfLink)
  - name: instance2_natIP
    value: $(ref.app-instance-2.networkInterfaces[0].accessConfigs[0].natIP)

---
# File: compute_instance.jinja

# PHASE 2 SECURITY HARDENING CHECKLIST:
# - [ ] Replace default service account with least-privilege custom service account
# - [ ] Add diskEncryptionKey with CMEK for all disks
# - [ ] Remove external IP / accessConfigs if not needed (use IAP for SSH)
# - [ ] Enable shielded VM settings (enableSecureBoot, enableVtpm, enableIntegrityMonitoring)
# - [ ] Restrict OAuth scopes beyond cloud-platform
# - [ ] Enable deletion protection for production instances
# - [ ] Configure OS Login instead of SSH keys

resources:
  - name: {{ env["name"] }}
    type: compute.v1.instance
    properties:
      zone: {{ properties["zone"] }}
      machineType: zones/{{ properties["zone"] }}/machineTypes/{{ properties["machineType"] }}
      description: {{ properties["instanceDescription"] }}

      tags:
        items:
          {% for tag in properties["tags"] %}
          - {{ tag }}
          {% endfor %}

      labels:
        {% for key, value in properties["labels"].items() %}
        {{ key }}: "{{ value }}"
        {% endfor %}

      # NOTE: Using default compute service account for Phase 1.
      # PHASE 2: Replace with custom service account with minimal permissions.
      serviceAccounts:
        - email: default
          scopes:
            - https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform

      disks:
        - deviceName: boot-disk
          type: PERSISTENT
          boot: true
          autoDelete: true
          initializeParams:
            sourceImage: {{ properties["sourceImage"] }}
            diskType: zones/{{ properties["zone"] }}/diskTypes/{{ properties["diskType"] }}
            diskSizeGb: {{ properties["diskSizeGb"] }}
          # PHASE 2 TODO: Add diskEncryptionKey block with Customer-Managed Encryption Key (CMEK)
          # diskEncryptionKey:
          #   kmsKeyName: projects/PROJECT/locations/LOCATION/keyRings/KEYRING/cryptoKeys/KEY

      networkInterfaces:
        - network: global/networks/{{ properties["network"] }}
          subnetwork: regions/{{ properties["zone"][:properties["zone"].rfind("-")] }}/subnetworks/{{ properties["subnet"] }}
          # PHASE 2 TODO: Remove accessConfigs to eliminate external IP; use Cloud IAP for access
          accessConfigs:
            - name: External NAT
              type: ONE_TO_ONE_NAT

      # PHASE 2 TODO: Enable shielded VM configuration
      # shieldedInstanceConfig:
      #   enableSecureBoot: true
      #   enableVtpm: true
      #   enableIntegrityMonitoring: true

      metadata:
        items:
          {% if properties["metadata"] is defined %}
          {% for key, value in properties["metadata"].items() %}
          - key: {{ key }}
            value: |
              {{ value | indent(14) }}
          {% endfor %}
          {% endif %}
          # PHASE 2 TODO: Enable OS Login
          # - key: enable-oslogin
          #   value: "TRUE"
          # PHASE 2 TODO: Block project-wide SSH keys
          # - key: block-project-ssh-keys
          #   value: "TRUE"

      # PHASE 2 TODO: Enable deletion protection for production
      # deletionProtection: true

outputs:
  - name: name
    value: $(ref.{{ env["name"] }}.name)
  - name: selfLink
    value: $(ref.{{ env["name"] }}.selfLink)
  - name: networkInterfaces
    value: $(ref.{{ env["name"] }}.networkInterfaces)

---
# File: compute_instance.jinja.schema

info:
  title: Compute Engine Instance Template
  author: Platform Team
  description: |
    Phase 1 deployment template for GCE instances.
    Uses default service account and Google-managed disk encryption.
    Phase 2 will add CMEK, custom service accounts, and security hardening.
  version: 1.0.0

required:
  - zone
  - machineType
  - sourceImage
  - network
  - subnet

properties:
  zone:
    type: string
    description: The GCP zone for the instance

  machineType:
    type: string
    description: The machine type for the instance
    default: n1-standard-1

  network:
    type: string
    description: The VPC network name
    default: default

  subnet:
    type: string
    description: The subnet name
    default: default

  instanceDescription:
    type: string
    description: Description of the instance
    default: "Phase 1 deployment instance"

  diskSizeGb:
    type: integer
    description: Boot disk size in GB
    default: 20
    minimum: 10

  diskType:
    type: string
    description: Boot disk type
    default: pd-standard
    enum:
      - pd-standard
      - pd-ssd
      - pd-balanced

  sourceImage:
    type: string
    description: The source image for the boot disk

  tags:
    type: array
    description: Network tags for the instance
    items:
      type: string
    default: []

  labels:
    type: object
    description: Labels to apply to the instance
    default: {}

  metadata:
    type: object
    description: Instance metadata key-value pairs
    default: {}
